# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-07-22T12:15:18.174447+00:00
Tools indexed: 204

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [baidu/Unlimited-OCR](https://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR) — momentum 88, ⭐16877 — OCR Engines — Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
- [PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR](https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR) — momentum 87, ⭐86020 — OCR Engines — Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit
- [tesseract-ocr/tesseract](https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract) — momentum 86, ⭐75499 — OCR Engines — Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)
